title: Hello World
description: Escreva um programa COBOL que exiba 'Hello World' na tela.
code:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HELLO.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           DISPLAY 'Hello World'.
           STOP RUN.

title: Declarar Variáveis
description: Declare variáveis para armazenar nome (30 chars); idade (3 dígitos); e salário (7 inteiros + 2 decimais packed).
code:
WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NOME     PIC X(30).
       01 WS-IDADE    PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-SALARIO  PIC S9(7)V99 COMP-3.

title: Soma Simples
description: Escreva COBOL que some dois números e exiba o resultado.
code:
WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NUM1  PIC 9(5) VALUE 150.
       01 WS-NUM2  PIC 9(5) VALUE 250.
       01 WS-SOMA  PIC 9(6) VALUE ZEROS.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           ADD WS-NUM1 TO WS-NUM2 GIVING WS-SOMA.
           DISPLAY 'SOMA = ' WS-SOMA.
           STOP RUN.

title: IF ELSE
description: Escreva um IF que teste se um número é positivo; negativo ou zero.
code:
EVALUATE TRUE
           WHEN WS-NUM > 0
               DISPLAY 'POSITIVO'
           WHEN WS-NUM < 0
               DISPLAY 'NEGATIVO'
           WHEN OTHER
               DISPLAY 'ZERO'
       END-EVALUATE.

title: PERFORM Loop
description: Escreva um PERFORM VARYING que exiba os números de 1 a 10.
code:
WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 10
               DISPLAY WS-I
           END-PERFORM.
           STOP RUN.

title: MOVE e DISPLAY
description: Mova valores para variáveis e exiba-os formatados.
code:
01 WS-NOME   PIC X(20) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-VALOR  PIC ZZZ;ZZ9.99.
       01 WS-BRUTO  PIC S9(7)V99 COMP-3 VALUE 15750.50.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 'ELIEL MIRANDA' TO WS-NOME.
           MOVE WS-BRUTO TO WS-VALOR.
           DISPLAY 'NOME: ' WS-NOME.
           DISPLAY 'VALOR: ' WS-VALOR.
           STOP RUN.

title: STRING Concat
description: Use STRING para concatenar nome e sobrenome com espaço.
code:
01 WS-NOME      PIC X(15) VALUE 'ELIEL'.
       01 WS-SOBRENOME  PIC X(15) VALUE 'MIRANDA'.
       01 WS-COMPLETO   PIC X(31) VALUE SPACES.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           STRING WS-NOME DELIMITED BY SPACES
                  ' '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                  WS-SOBRENOME DELIMITED BY SPACES
                  INTO WS-COMPLETO
           END-STRING.
           DISPLAY WS-COMPLETO.
           STOP RUN.

title: UNSTRING Parse
description: Use UNSTRING para separar 'ELIEL;30;RECIFE' em 3 campos.
code:
01 WS-LINHA   PIC X(30) VALUE 'ELIEL;30;RECIFE'.
       01 WS-NOME    PIC X(10).
       01 WS-IDADE   PIC X(5).
       01 WS-CIDADE  PIC X(10).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           UNSTRING WS-LINHA DELIMITED BY ';'
               INTO WS-NOME WS-IDADE WS-CIDADE
           END-UNSTRING.
           DISPLAY WS-NOME ' - ' WS-IDADE ' - ' WS-CIDADE.
           STOP RUN.

title: INSPECT Count
description: Conte quantas vezes a letra 'A' aparece em uma string.
code:
01 WS-TEXTO PIC X(30) VALUE 'BANANA ABACAXI'.
       01 WS-CONTA PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           INSPECT WS-TEXTO TALLYING WS-CONTA
               FOR ALL 'A'.
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL DE A: ' WS-CONTA.
           STOP RUN.

title: Tabela Simples
description: Defina uma tabela de 5 nomes e exiba todos.
code:
01 WS-TABELA.
          05 WS-NOME PIC X(10) OCCURS 5 TIMES.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(1).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 'ANA'   TO WS-NOME(1).
           MOVE 'BRUNO' TO WS-NOME(2).
           MOVE 'CARLA' TO WS-NOME(3).
           MOVE 'DANIEL'TO WS-NOME(4).
           MOVE 'ELENA' TO WS-NOME(5).
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 5
               DISPLAY WS-NOME(WS-I)
           END-PERFORM.
           STOP RUN.

title: Nivel 88
description: Use nível 88 para classificar um status.
code:
01 WS-STATUS PIC X(1).
          88 WS-ATIVO    VALUE 'A'.
          88 WS-INATIVO  VALUE 'I'.
          88 WS-BLOQUEADO VALUE 'B'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 'A' TO WS-STATUS.
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN WS-ATIVO
                   DISPLAY 'CLIENTE ATIVO'
               WHEN WS-INATIVO
                   DISPLAY 'CLIENTE INATIVO'
               WHEN WS-BLOQUEADO
                   DISPLAY 'CLIENTE BLOQUEADO'
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'STATUS INVALIDO'
           END-EVALUATE.
           STOP RUN.

title: COMPUTE
description: Use COMPUTE para calcular o IMC (peso / altura²).
code:
01 WS-PESO   PIC 9(3)V9  VALUE 75.5.
       01 WS-ALTURA PIC 9V99    VALUE 1.75.
       01 WS-IMC    PIC 99.99.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           COMPUTE WS-IMC = WS-PESO /
               (WS-ALTURA ** 2).
           DISPLAY 'IMC = ' WS-IMC.
           STOP RUN.

title: Ler Arquivo Seq
description: Escreva um programa que leia um arquivo sequencial e exiba cada registro.
code:
ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT ARQ-ENTRADA ASSIGN TO ARQENT
               FILE STATUS IS WS-FS.
       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD ARQ-ENTRADA.
       01 REG-ENTRADA PIC X(80).
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-FS     PIC XX.
       01 WS-EOF    PIC X VALUE 'N'.
          88 EOF-SIM VALUE 'S'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQ-ENTRADA.
           IF WS-FS NOT = '00'
               DISPLAY 'ERRO OPEN: ' WS-FS
               STOP RUN
           END-IF.
           PERFORM UNTIL EOF-SIM
               READ ARQ-ENTRADA
                   AT END SET EOF-SIM TO TRUE
                   NOT AT END
                       DISPLAY REG-ENTRADA
               END-READ
           END-PERFORM.
           CLOSE ARQ-ENTRADA.
           STOP RUN.

title: Gerar Relatório
description: Gere um relatório com cabeçalho; detalhe e totalizador.
code:
FD ARQ-SAIDA.
       01 REG-SAIDA PIC X(80).
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-TOTAL  PIC S9(9)V99 COMP-3 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CONT   PIC 9(5) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CAB.
          05 FILLER PIC X(30) VALUE 'RELATORIO DE VENDAS'.
          05 FILLER PIC X(50) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-DET.
          05 WS-DET-NOME  PIC X(30).
          05 WS-DET-VALOR PIC ZZZ;ZZ9.99.
          05 FILLER       PIC X(39) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-TOT.
          05 FILLER PIC X(30) VALUE 'TOTAL:'.
          05 WS-TOT-VALOR PIC ZZZ;ZZZ;ZZ9.99.
          05 FILLER PIC X(36) VALUE SPACES.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN OUTPUT ARQ-SAIDA.
           WRITE REG-SAIDA FROM WS-CAB AFTER PAGE.
      *    (loop de leitura e escrita de detalhe)
           ADD WS-DET-VALOR-NUM TO WS-TOTAL.
           ADD 1 TO WS-CONT.
      *    (fim do loop)
           MOVE WS-TOTAL TO WS-TOT-VALOR.
           WRITE REG-SAIDA FROM WS-TOT AFTER 2.
           CLOSE ARQ-SAIDA.
           STOP RUN.

title: SEARCH Tabela
description: Use SEARCH para encontrar um código em tabela de UFs.
code:
01 WS-TAB-UF.
          05 WS-UF-ENTRY OCCURS 27 TIMES
              ASCENDING KEY IS WS-UF-SIGLA
              INDEXED BY WS-UF-IDX.
             10 WS-UF-SIGLA PIC X(2).
             10 WS-UF-NOME  PIC X(20).
       01 WS-BUSCA PIC X(2) VALUE 'PE'.
       01 WS-RESULTADO PIC X(20).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
      *    (carregar tabela com UFs)
           SET WS-UF-IDX TO 1.
           SEARCH ALL WS-UF-ENTRY
               AT END
                   MOVE 'NAO ENCONTRADA' TO WS-RESULTADO
               WHEN WS-UF-SIGLA(WS-UF-IDX) = WS-BUSCA
                   MOVE WS-UF-NOME(WS-UF-IDX)
                       TO WS-RESULTADO
           END-SEARCH.
           DISPLAY WS-RESULTADO.
           STOP RUN.

title: CALL Subprograma
description: Crie um programa principal que chame um subprograma para calcular juros compostos.
code:
* PROGRAMA PRINCIPAL
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CAPITAL  PIC S9(9)V99 COMP-3 VALUE 10000.
       01 WS-TAXA     PIC S9V9(4) COMP-3 VALUE 0.015.
       01 WS-MESES    PIC S9(4) COMP VALUE 12.
       01 WS-MONTANTE PIC S9(11)V99 COMP-3.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           CALL 'CALCJURO' USING
               WS-CAPITAL WS-TAXA WS-MESES WS-MONTANTE.
           DISPLAY 'MONTANTE: ' WS-MONTANTE.
           STOP RUN.
      * SUBPROGRAMA CALCJURO
       LINKAGE SECTION.
       01 LS-CAPITAL  PIC S9(9)V99 COMP-3.
       01 LS-TAXA     PIC S9V9(4) COMP-3.
       01 LS-MESES    PIC S9(4) COMP.
       01 LS-MONTANTE PIC S9(11)V99 COMP-3.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING
           LS-CAPITAL LS-TAXA LS-MESES LS-MONTANTE.
           COMPUTE LS-MONTANTE =
               LS-CAPITAL * (1 + LS-TAXA) ** LS-MESES.
           GOBACK.

title: SORT Interno
description: Use SORT dentro do COBOL com INPUT PROCEDURE.
code:
SD SORT-FILE.
       01 SORT-REG.
          05 SF-CHAVE PIC X(10).
          05 SF-DADOS PIC X(70).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           SORT SORT-FILE
               ON ASCENDING KEY SF-CHAVE
               INPUT PROCEDURE IS 1000-INPUT
               GIVING ARQ-SAIDA.
           STOP RUN.
       1000-INPUT SECTION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQ-ENTRADA.
           PERFORM UNTIL EOF-SIM
               READ ARQ-ENTRADA
                   AT END SET EOF-SIM TO TRUE
                   NOT AT END
                       IF REG-STATUS = 'A'
                           MOVE REG-ENTRADA TO SORT-REG
                           RELEASE SORT-REG
                       END-IF
               END-READ
           END-PERFORM.
           CLOSE ARQ-ENTRADA.
       1000-EXIT.
           EXIT.

title: Validar CPF
description: Escreva a lógica de validação dos dígitos verificadores de um CPF.
code:
01 WS-CPF        PIC 9(11).
       01 WS-CPF-R REDEFINES WS-CPF.
          05 WS-DIG PIC 9 OCCURS 11.
       01 WS-SOMA PIC 9(5).
       01 WS-RESTO PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-DV1  PIC 9.
       01 WS-DV2  PIC 9.
       01 WS-I    PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-MULT PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SOMA.
           MOVE 10 TO WS-MULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 9
               COMPUTE WS-SOMA = WS-SOMA +
                   WS-DIG(WS-I) * WS-MULT
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-MULT
           END-PERFORM.
           COMPUTE WS-RESTO =
               FUNCTION MOD(WS-SOMA 11).
           IF WS-RESTO < 2
               MOVE 0 TO WS-DV1
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-DV1 = 11 - WS-RESTO
           END-IF.
           IF WS-DV1 = WS-DIG(10)
               DISPLAY 'PRIMEIRO DV OK'
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'CPF INVALIDO'
           END-IF.
           STOP RUN.

title: Master-Transaction
description: Implemente o padrão Master-Transaction Update para atualizar um cadastro.
code:
* Lê MASTER e TRANSACAO (ambos ordenados por chave)
      * Gera MASTER-ATUALIZADO
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQ-MASTER ARQ-TRANS
                OUTPUT ARQ-MASTER-NOVO.
           READ ARQ-MASTER AT END SET EOF-M TO TRUE.
           READ ARQ-TRANS AT END SET EOF-T TO TRUE.
           PERFORM UNTIL EOF-M AND EOF-T
               EVALUATE TRUE
                   WHEN CHAVE-M < CHAVE-T OR EOF-T
                       WRITE REG-NOVO FROM REG-MASTER
                       READ ARQ-MASTER AT END
                           SET EOF-M TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                   WHEN CHAVE-M = CHAVE-T
                       PERFORM APLICA-TRANSACAO
                       WRITE REG-NOVO FROM REG-MASTER
                       READ ARQ-MASTER AT END
                           SET EOF-M TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                       READ ARQ-TRANS AT END
                           SET EOF-T TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                   WHEN CHAVE-M > CHAVE-T OR EOF-M
                       PERFORM TRATA-INCLUSAO
                       READ ARQ-TRANS AT END
                           SET EOF-T TO TRUE
                       END-READ
               END-EVALUATE
           END-PERFORM.
           CLOSE ARQ-MASTER ARQ-TRANS ARQ-MASTER-NOVO.
           STOP RUN.

title: CICS CRUD Completo
description: Escreva a PROCEDURE DIVISION de um programa CICS que faz consulta; inclusão e alteração de cliente em VSAM.
code:
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN EIBCALEN = 0
                   PERFORM 1000-PRIMEIRO-ACESSO
               WHEN OTHER
                   PERFORM 2000-RETORNO
           END-EVALUATE.
           EXEC CICS RETURN
               TRANSID('CLI1')
               COMMAREA(WS-COMMAREA)
               LENGTH(LENGTH OF WS-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.
       1000-PRIMEIRO-ACESSO.
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') ERASE END-EXEC.
       2000-RETORNO.
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') INTO(MAPCLI-I)
           END-EXEC.
           EVALUATE EIBAID
               WHEN DFHPF3
                   EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC
               WHEN DFHENTER
                   EVALUATE WS-ACAO
                       WHEN 'C'
                           PERFORM 3000-CONSULTAR
                       WHEN 'I'
                           PERFORM 4000-INCLUIR
                       WHEN 'A'
                           PERFORM 5000-ALTERAR
                   END-EVALUATE
           END-EVALUATE.
       3000-CONSULTAR.
           EXEC CICS READ FILE('CADCLI')
               INTO(WS-REG-CLI)
               LENGTH(WS-LEN)
               RIDFLD(WS-CPF)
               RESP(WS-RESP)
           END-EXEC.
           IF WS-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
               PERFORM MONTA-TELA-DADOS
           ELSE
               MOVE 'CLIENTE NAO ENCONTRADO'
                   TO MSG-TELAO
           END-IF.
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') DATAONLY END-EXEC.

title: DB2 Batch COBOL
description: Escreva programa COBOL/DB2 batch que processe cursor com COMMIT a cada 1000 registros.
code:
WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
           EXEC SQL INCLUDE SQLCA END-EXEC.
       01 WS-CONT     PIC 9(7) COMP VALUE 0.
       01 WS-COMMIT   PIC 9(7) COMP VALUE 1000.
       01 WS-CONTA    PIC S9(9) COMP.
       01 WS-SALDO    PIC S9(13)V99 COMP-3.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           EXEC SQL
               DECLARE C1 CURSOR WITH HOLD FOR
               SELECT CONTA; SALDO
               FROM CONTAS
               WHERE STATUS = 'A'
               FOR UPDATE OF SALDO
           END-EXEC.
           EXEC SQL OPEN C1 END-EXEC.
           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE = 100
               EXEC SQL FETCH C1
                   INTO :WS-CONTA; :WS-SALDO
               END-EXEC
               IF SQLCODE = 0
                   COMPUTE WS-SALDO = WS-SALDO *
                       1.005
                   EXEC SQL UPDATE CONTAS
                       SET SALDO = :WS-SALDO
                       WHERE CURRENT OF C1
                   END-EXEC
                   ADD 1 TO WS-CONT
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-CONT;
                       WS-COMMIT) = 0
                       EXEC SQL COMMIT END-EXEC
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           EXEC SQL COMMIT END-EXEC.
           EXEC SQL CLOSE C1 END-EXEC.
           DISPLAY 'REGISTROS: ' WS-CONT.
           STOP RUN.

title: JSON Generate
description: Use JSON GENERATE para converter uma estrutura COBOL em JSON.
code:
01 WS-CLIENTE.
          05 NOME    PIC X(30) VALUE 'ELIEL MIRANDA'.
          05 IDADE   PIC 9(3) VALUE 30.
          05 SALDO   PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 15000.50.
       01 WS-JSON    PIC X(500).
       01 WS-JSON-LEN PIC 9(5).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           JSON GENERATE WS-JSON FROM WS-CLIENTE
               COUNT IN WS-JSON-LEN.
           DISPLAY WS-JSON(1:WS-JSON-LEN).
      *    Resultado:
      *    {"NOME":"ELIEL MIRANDA";
      *     "IDADE":30;"SALDO":15000.50}
           STOP RUN.

FROM CLIENTES

title: Subquery
description: Encontre clientes com saldo acima da média.
code:
SELECT CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO
FROM CLIENTES
WHERE CLI_SALDO > (
    SELECT AVG(CLI_SALDO)
    FROM CLIENTES
    WHERE CLI_STATUS = 'A'
)
ORDER BY CLI_SALDO DESC;

title: CASE Expression
description: Use CASE para classificar clientes por faixa de saldo.
code:
SELECT CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO;
    CASE
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 100000 THEN 'PREMIUM'
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 10000  THEN 'GOLD'
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 1000   THEN 'SILVER'
        ELSE 'BASICO'
    END AS CATEGORIA
FROM CLIENTES
WHERE CLI_STATUS = 'A'
ORDER BY CLI_SALDO DESC;

title: MERGE Statement
description: Use MERGE para sincronizar tabela de staging com produção.
code:
MERGE INTO CLIENTES_PROD P
USING CLIENTES_STAGING S
    ON P.CLI_CPF = S.CLI_CPF
WHEN MATCHED AND S.CLI_STATUS = 'D' THEN
    DELETE
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        P.CLI_NOME = S.CLI_NOME;
        P.CLI_SALDO = S.CLI_SALDO;
        P.CLI_STATUS = S.CLI_STATUS
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (CLI_CPF; CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO; CLI_STATUS)
    VALUES (S.CLI_CPF; S.CLI_NOME; S.CLI_SALDO;
            S.CLI_STATUS);

title: COBOL Ex 55
description: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 55).
code:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

title: COBOL Ex 61
description: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 61).

code:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

description: Escreva uma query com HAVING (exercício 573).
code:
SELECT CLI_STATUS; COUNT(*) AS TOTAL
FROM CLIENTES
GROUP BY CLI_STATUS
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY TOTAL DESC;

title: COBOL Ex 574
description: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 574).
code:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

SELECT CLI_STATUS; COUNT(*) AS TOTAL
FROM CLIENTES
GROUP BY CLI_STATUS
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY TOTAL DESC;

title: COBOL Ex 658
description: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 658).
code:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

description: Escreva uma query com HAVING (exercício 741).
code:
SELECT CLI_STATUS; COUNT(*) AS TOTAL
FROM CLIENTES
GROUP BY CLI_STATUS
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY TOTAL DESC;

title: COBOL Ex 742
description: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 742).
code:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.
